task_completion.description: Verify that the new exercise category 'Powerlifting Lifts' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show 'Powerlifting Lifts' in the list of Exercise Categories, or a success message indicating the category was created in the wger interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent located exercises containing 'Deadlift'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a search or filter applied for 'Deadlift' in the exercises list, or the edit page for a specific 'Deadlift' exercise.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Deadlift' exercises were reassigned to the 'Powerlifting Lifts' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the category dropdown set to 'Powerlifting Lifts' for a 'Deadlift' exercise, a success message confirming the update, or the exercise list displaying 'Powerlifting Lifts' as the category for 'Deadlift'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent located exercises containing 'Bench Press'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a search or filter applied for 'Bench Press' in the exercises list, or the edit page for a specific 'Bench Press' exercise.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Bench Press' exercises were reassigned to the 'Powerlifting Lifts' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the category dropdown set to 'Powerlifting Lifts' for a 'Bench Press' exercise, a success message confirming the update, or the exercise list displaying 'Powerlifting Lifts' as the category for 'Bench Press'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the wger fitness manager at localhost, rather than API testing tools like Postman or curl.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database manipulation to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should not show terminal windows running SQL commands, python manage.py shell, or direct database edits to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the genuine wger application interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should display the authentic wger fitness manager UI or its Django admin panel, not a text editor or a mock HTML file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected new exercise category is exactly 'Powerlifting Lifts'. The agent must reassign exercises whose names contain 'Deadlift' and 'Bench Press' to this new category. Verification should confirm these specific strings are used in the wger UI.
